subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Three days ago a special letter was written, and today a letter unto His Holiness the Spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان سه روز پیش نامه مخصوص نگاشته شد و امروز نامه ای که بحضرت روح
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @martyrdom of the Bab, @Shrines and Holy places, @growth of the Cause
